5516: Woven fabrics of artificial staple fibres
55162310: Jacquard fabrics of a width of 140 cm or more (mattress tickings) The explanatory note to subheading 5211 49 10 applies, mutatis mutandis. CHAPTER 56 WADDING, FELT AND NONWOVENS; SPECIAL YARNS; TWINE, CORDAGE, ROPES AND CABLES AND ARTICLES THEREOF General For the classification, within headings, of articles composed of two or more textile materials, see the general explanatory note to this section.
